channel.title: Bike Builds on Mizubikes
channel.description: Recent content in Bike Builds on Mizubikes

item.title: Buying a New or Used Gravel Bike? Check the Dropout Before You Commit to SRAM 1x13
item.description: If you want to run SRAM's 13-speed XPLR groupset, your frame needs a UDH dropout. Here's what to look for on popular gravel bikes — new and used.

item.title: Factor Ostro VAM V2 Build
item.description: A full custom build of the Factor Ostro VAM V2 — lightweight aero road bike with Shimano Di2, Quarq power meter, BTLos wheels, and a custom 3D printed headset spacer.
